title: Nether Remastered
description: Makes you work a little harder to get to the nether, no more quick progression!
body:
🔥 What is Nether Remastered Looking for bit more of a challenge? Inspired by the amazing End Remastered, this mod makes it more of a challenge to enter The Nether. No longer can you simply just obtain some obsidian, craft a flint & steel, activate portal and stroll on into The Nether. You can still craft and activate the portal however you will no longer be able to enter the dimension. 📜 How To Enter The Nether - Create Obsidian Infused Bottles with 2x Glass and 1x Crying Obsidian (Crafts x3) - Hold the Obsidian Infused Bottle in your off-hand and kill any undead mob, doing so will trap the Nether Essence inside the bottle (Mobs can be added/removed in the config) - Obtain all four shard pieces from Evokers, Witches, Abandoned Mineshafts and Pillager Outposts. (Note: Each mob/structure only drops ONE variant of the shard. I.e. Evoker only drops the bottom left shard.). - Now you need the Nether Crystal, this can be found in suspicious sand or gravel. - Once you've obtain all the required items you can now craft the Seal Of The Underworld - Use the seal to be granted access to the Nether

 

 

How to obtain Nether Essence, Mysterious Shards and Nether Crystal
